message:
feat(tests): expand enrichment integration test coverage with 48 new subsystem-specific test suites

Adds comprehensive enrichment integration tests for engine subsystems including:

- adversarial_campaign, ast, baseline_interpreter, budget_propagation_contract,
  catastrophic_tail_tournament_gate, claim_publication_gate, compiler_policy,
  controller_composition_matrix, cross_workload_transfer, entropic_policy_morphing,
  epoch_invalidation, evidence_replay_checker, forensic_replayer,
  governance_mechanism, hindsight_boundary_capture, hindsight_escalation_bundle,
  hole_witness_generator, hostcall_session_protocol, incentive_governance_mechanism,
  ir_contract, jsx_tsx_parser, law_promotion_pack, law_proof_refutation,
  marker_stream, migration_compatibility, orchestration_context_contract,
  parser_gap_inventory, principal_key_roles, proof_backed_compression,
  proof_ingestion, quickening_feedback_lattice, react_compile_run_parity,
  react_repro_triage, recovery_artifact, rgc_test_harness,
  runtime_decision_core, safe_mode_fallback, saga_orchestrator,
  semantic_transport_ledger, specialization_lane_gate, stdlib,
  tee_attestation_policy, test_flake_quarantine_workflow,
  transport_certificate_ledger, ts_module_resolution, typed_array_fast_lane,
  workload_transfer_prior
- Also expands existing parser_enrichment_integration.rs with +1523 lines
  of deep property tests and edge-case coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
